review_title: Secured, Easy to edit files,Fast file transferring, and integration with unlimited version capabilities
description: My experience was enjoyable and fulfilling.
author: Carlo V.
pros: It is very affordable, fast, and easy to use.
cons: Sometimes, it's not easy to sync, and a tutorial is needed. But it's easy to overcome.

review_title: Great for Team Productivity
author: Benjamin T.
pros: Colloboration with multiple users at the same time, comment, share feedback - Team Productivity increasing together with the integration with other Zoho Products
cons: Filtering Option, to find files in large folders is sometimes slow and the search is not as advanced as some other competitors

review_title: Sharing files made easy
description: Overall it's a simple and effective solution for sharing files. If that's all you need it for it's a great site
author: Cass B.
pros: Easy place to share files with my colleagues. It's safe and only we can access the documents that we upload
cons: It lacks a lot of support options that many websites have nowadays with chatbots, AI and human chat options

review_title: Secure document storage for sensitive client files.
description: With so much important material, it is unfeasible to compromise on document safety and security. The application gives us security. It is incredibly easy to use for organizing thousands of case files though sharing external folders with less tech-savvy clients can sometimes be tricky.
author: Brian Y.
pros: This platform gives users instant access to team collaboration features that let them write, edit, sign, share, review, or get immediate access to the exact latest version of client affidavits.
cons: The link provided on file sharing websites sometimes expires sooner than expected, thus leaving customers at the mercy of unsatisfied support systems. Sometimes, they make us reach out to a forum which causes much more disruption to our everyday lives.

review_title: Great cloud storage solution for business professionals
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Zoho Workdrive has a really simple user interface which makes it easy to use. Its simple file sharing process also makes team collaboration very effective and it is really cost effective solution compared to its competitors.The support team is also very responsive while dealing with issues
cons: Could have better integrations with other applications, currently only Zoho suite application can be integrated, the offline feature needs some work to be done on. We also do not get a personal storage everything is interlinked with the team

review_title: Differentiates from the big name competitors in a few key ways
description: We switched from Google Suite and have found this a very comparable tool.
author: Justin H.
pros: There are several addons to the “standard” file sharing that make this quite worthwhile. We use the Snap tool to screen record and share for trainings. Further, sharing content outside the org is more secure as external users need to verify identity first. The doc management and admin features are standard and quite good.
cons: Users need to install additional tools to use workdrive and the integration to Microsoft suite of products isn’t as good as OneDrive.

review_title: Get it now if you can!
description: Truly great product and, overall, very easy to use!
author: Jeremy K.
pros: If you're looking for an easy storage solution that mends seamlessly, this is it.
cons: Initial set up is a bit wonky but then it's smooth sailing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It's working
description: This product has made it much easier to test using your available documents and check and require documents at the right time. It has helped us reach our goals about that process.
author: Sara K.
pros: Zoho Docs has allowed us to add information to sheets with color diagram and timetable, and open new possibilities for data management in our office. Everything is self-contained and everyone on the team has access to sharing method view and upload any kind of data.
cons: Generally, the program is working well, but we have been limited by small issues with synchronization, which is very slow from time to time based on technical restrictions.

review_title: Store data easily
author: Mathew M.
pros: It's tool which helps me to store data from every zoho app and it's easy to use and access because it's integrated with other tools of zoho.
cons: Zoho WorkDrive storage capacity is a bit not larger like Google Drive therefore store limited data compared to other tools.

review_title: incredible experience using zoho workDrive
description: I had an incredible experience using zoho workDrive
author: Ngiria K.
pros: Zoho workDrive is easy to use and accessible in any device and browser
cons: Zoho workDrive's search engine is occasionally slow

review_title: Great Alternative for Dropbox
description: Overall very good. File upload is fast and file are easily accessible. Mobile app works good as well and saves files easily.
author: Thomas S.
pros: Like the integration into all Zoho products. Easy to use and very similar like Dropbox. File and Folder structure are easy to manage and share with clients.
cons: Not a lot of clients know Zoho Workdrive yet and hesitate to accept links when sharing it via email.

review_title: Zoho WorkDrive Review
description: Zoho WorkDrive is a comprehensive cloud storage and collaboration platform that offers a range of features to enhance productivity and teamwork
author: THANIGAIVEL BHEEMARAJ S.
pros: Centralized Storage Version Control Powerful Search Real-time Collaboration File Sharing and Permissions Comments and Annotations Seamless Workflow Consistent User Experience Security Measures and Compliance and Regulations
cons: Complexity Navigation File Size Limits Restrictions Performance Issues and Limited Third-Party Integrations
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A Solid cloud storage and collaboration solution for team
description: Overall, Zoho WorkDrive is a solid cloud storage and collaboration solution with a good balance of features and affordability
author: Elvis O.
pros: Zoho WorkDrive offers comprehensive features at affordable prices paired with high security features
cons: Offline access features can be limited compared to some cloud storage providers which may be a drawback for those who frequently working offline.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best cloud storage platform for small enterprises
description: It comes with a web and desktop version. The document folders and other team administration tools are located on the dashboard's left menu. For easier access, we may add label to important folders and documents. Many filtering and sorting options makes it easier to search a file. Additionally, files and folders to be shown in a list or tile layout can be chosen as per user need.
author: Jigar A.
pros: The advance features like real-time data synchronization, unlimited file versioning with user-friendly design and quick customer care makes it great cloud storage platform to consider.
cons: It does not offer zero-knowledge encryption. It implies that anyone who is able to breach Zoho's protection might have an access to our data.

review_title: How To Take The Headache Out Of Driving Your Team.
description: My team really benefits from TeamDrive for all the reasons mentioned above. My experience with TeamDrive overall has been really good. The current Zoho TeamDrive support team is swift, to the point and friendly if you have a question of any kind. I have autism and am sometimes not that quick on the uptake, the team has been, and still is, really patient with me. Thanks team Zoho.
author: Mark H.
pros: Having tried many tools out there, I can now say that I finally found an outstanding solution in Zoho Team Drive that suits and benefits my team. What did it for me are the instant notifications, no longer having to send files as attachments, the draft functionality is really handy. Separation of private and public space is included, which is not a given with other products I tested. What I liked most is the integration with other Zoho products. So, if you are already using Zoho products, I would recommend adding Team Drive to your account. Disclosure, I was part of the beta test. I mention this because my feedback was really appreciated and I could see small tweaks here and there being made in a fashionable time frame. Which gave me a good feeling. First proper testing and then release a new version. Basically how it should always be done, anywhere but not always happens. Zoho has solid but still rapid development in their DNA.
cons: What I like the least about this software is fair but always hard to answer the question. Obviously, I like the software and would suggest everyone give it a try. What it is currently lacking but I know it is coming, so not an issue for me is what would be described as "Infinite Sync" that would make it possible to access your files in TeamDrive without them being physically on your computer. I think everyone would agree that is an awesome feature, coming to your TeamDrive in the near future. Can't wait for that one!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Collaboration tool for professionals.
description: Zoho WorkDrive really a must need tool to manage the teams. The password protection for links and expiry enchnace the security one level up. The unlimited file versioning feature allows us to jump back to the any previous version of file. Two ways sync allows us to modify the files on the go and push notifications help other to know about the modification in your workspace.
author: Sanchita A.
pros: Zoho WorkDrive is a collaboration tool to manage the files in more discipline manner. It provide the secure shared work place to shared the data and documents. The web interface simplifying user interface. Zoho WorkDrive is design in such as way which simplify the workflow in team and between the teams. Managing and administrations of team is easy to get your WorkDrive secure space with features like monitoring the activities and audit trail. Confidential data can be secure with access control where we can protect the data to get accessed or modified. Activity timeline help us to know the operation performed on our file.
cons: Zoho WorkDrive is a fully featured collaboration tool but the only one thing I am disappointed with is the two factor authentication and dedicated account manager features is missing in the Starter and Team editions. As these are the most useful features which make the Zoho WorkDrive more robust tool.

review_title: Abundant, Easy to Use Document Storage
description: We needed a file sharing, archiving and collaboration solution when COVID hit. Being that a majority of the users weren't computer savvy, we also needed something simple and easy to use. Also, since we are a small non-profit, we needed something that provided that simplicity at an affordable price. It was a tall order. However, I found WorkDrive and just marveled at how easy it was to use and it was cheaper than some other options. Not the cheapest, but considering the countless hours I have avoided because it is simple to use, reliable and always available, well worth it. Also VERY simple to setup and get started.
author: Steve M.
pros: Very easy to use and just plain works. They're adding new features regularly. In just shy of two years using it, I have only contacted support twice. Part of a robust suite of products from the same vendor. Generous storage allotment and file size limit.
cons: While their unpaid support option is a bit slow due to the time lag between USA Central and their local time, I've only had to use it twice in just shy of two years and each time the support rep was knowledgeable and solved my issue on the first try.

review_title: patson review Zoho workdrive
description: great cloud ever it's very important to get and work with it it's does not take your time
author: patrick M.
pros: it's great its works better by transferring files
cons: is a professional platform that makes a different in the company

review_title: Works Well on Its Own, I Wish We Had More Integrations
description: Totally good option if you're using the Zoho Suite and getting it as part of Zoho One, but steer clear for a while to let it fully mature if you're already using another cloud storage solution.
author: Peter F.
pros: Very intuitive and user-friendly. Works just like Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive, etc. The desktop app, after a few glitches early on, actually works really well (I'm on a Mac). I like how many options I have to gate access to certain files. It's really easy to get organized.
cons: I wish there were more integrations, especially within the Zoho Suite. They rolled the product out over 8 months ago, and there still isn't an integration with Zoho Analytics.

review_title: Simple UI with lots of useful features
author: Rafael S.
pros: I appreciate how easy it is to navigate Work Drive and to find what I need. Sharing options allow me to toggle downloads, uploads, and many other permissions very easily.
cons: So far I haven't found any cons or anything that could improve.

review_title: An alternative to cloud and online file management
author: Anais B.
pros: For those looking for alternatives to traditional cloud services and file management such as Google Drive, Zoho Team Drive represents a very good one. With almost all the tools offered by the market reference, this application offers a plus, file monitoring and management to measure the performance and productivity of work teams. If you want to try something new and different this tool waits for you, I recommend it.
cons: It does not have the ability to generate forms and this leaves it one step behind Google Drive, as the forms are used a lot in the airline for dealing with customers and our workers.

review_title: Affordable and One of the Best Alternative
description: It has good integration with other apps also. For example- We use Zoho CRM and Zoho Finance Software. And It is super easy and much integrated with the Zoho Workdrive. In short, the collaboration with other software is also good.
author: Amit S.
pros: The Cloud-Based Workspace is super easy and intuitive in terms of User Experience. It is well integrated with Zoho Ecosystem. Collaboration with the Teammate is super easy. It gave 100 GB of space in its Starter Pack, which is decent as compared to competitors.
cons: Not any major dislike. But the alternatives (like Google Drive and Microsoft Workspace) are way too ahead in terms of features and security.

review_title: Zoho WorkDrive is a Rudimentary file Saving tool
author: Shashank M.
pros: Zoho WorkDrive is an immensely elementary tool for online storage of my essential repositories. This platform is efficient and very convenient for new users to operate efficiently. Saving numerous documents is immensely simple on Zoho WorkDrive.
cons: I defiantly have a problem with Zoho WorkDrive. This software is very slow to upload hefty files. The slow uploading of files in Zoho WorkDrive is often very frustrating.

review_title: Assured E-memory space
description: My team can easily share and edit documents online to fast track results
author: Adeyemi O.
pros: I love the feature access to files within team members and edits can be made online too
cons: Occasionally, access to my work drive account space takes a while and loads too much

review_title: Fantastic team solution
description: Very good solution for small teams/companies. Easy to setup and easy to use.
author: Edo M.
pros: User interface is simple and easy to understand. Team management is fantastic. Fantastic upload speed. Standalone versions for PC and smartphones are always welcomed solutions. Dashboard is completely my type (of design) with lot of options.
cons: File preview for an image (photo) are slow or not working. Thumbnails are not generated in automatic. Preview is not available for many popular formats, like .pdf and with some others (like .docx) have small problems. Filters are really very basic.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
